verses.latin_vulgate: Laus cantici ipsi David.   Venite, exsultemus Domino ;  jubilemus Deo salutari nostro ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְ֭כוּ נְרַנְּנָ֣ה לַיהֹוָ֑ה נָ֝רִ֗יעָה לְצ֣וּר יִשְׁעֵֽנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Come let us praise the Lord with joy: let us joyfully sing to God our saviour.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tulkaat, veisatkaamme kiitosta Herralle, ja iloitkaamme meidän autuutemme turvalle!
verses.king_james: O come, let us sing unto the Lord: let us make a joyful noise to the rock of our salvation.

verses.latin_vulgate: præoccupemus faciem ejus in confessione,  et in psalmis jubilemus ei :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נְקַדְּמָ֣ה פָנָ֣יו בְּתוֹדָ֑ה בִּ֝זְמִר֗וֹת נָרִ֥יעַֽ לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let us come before his presence with thanksgiving; and make a joyful noise to him with psalms.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tulkaamme hänen kasvoinsa eteen kiitoksella, ja riemuitkaamme hänelle lauluilla!
verses.king_james: Let us come before his presence with thanksgiving, and make a joyful noise unto him with psalms.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam Deus magnus Dominus,  et rex magnus super omnes deos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י אֵ֣ל גָּד֣וֹל יְהֹוָ֑ה וּמֶ֥לֶךְ גָּ֝ד֗וֹל עַל־כׇּל־אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: For the Lord is a great God, and a great King above all gods.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herra on suuri Jumala, ja suuri kuningas kaikkein jumalain ylitse.
verses.king_james: For the Lord is a great God, and a great King above all gods.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia in manu ejus sunt omnes fines terræ,  et altitudines montium ipsius sunt ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁ֣ר בְּ֭יָדוֹ מֶחְקְרֵי־אָ֑רֶץ וְתוֹעֲפֹ֖ת הָרִ֣ים לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For in his hand are all the ends of the earth: and the heights of the mountains are his.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä hänen kädessänsä on kaikki, mitä maa kantaa, ja vuorten kukkulat ovat myös hänen.
verses.king_james: In his hand are the deep places of the earth: the strength of the hills is his also.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam ipsius est mare, et ipse fecit illud,  et siccam manus ejus formaverunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁר־ל֣וֹ הַ֭יָּם וְה֣וּא עָשָׂ֑הוּ וְ֝יַבֶּ֗שֶׁת יָדָ֥יו יָצָֽרוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For the sea is his, and he made it: and his hands formed the dry land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä hänen on meri, ja hän on sen tehnyt, ja hänen kätensä ovat kuivan valmistaneet.
verses.king_james: The sea is his, and he made it: and his hands formed the dry land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Venite, adoremus, et procidamus,  et ploremus ante Dominum qui fecit nos :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֹּ֭אוּ נִשְׁתַּחֲוֶ֣ה וְנִכְרָ֑עָה נִ֝בְרְכָ֗ה לִֽפְנֵי־יְהֹוָ֥ה עֹשֵֽׂנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Come let us adore and fall down: and weep before the Lord that made us.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tulkaat, kumartakaamme ja polvillemme langetkaamme, ja maahan laskeukaamme Herran meidän Luojamme eteen!
verses.king_james: O come, let us worship and bow down: let us kneel before the Lord our maker.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia ipse est Dominus Deus noster,  et nos populus pascuæ ejus, et oves manus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֘י־ה֤וּא אֱלֹהֵ֗ינוּ וַאֲנַ֤חְנוּ עַ֣ם מַ֭רְעִיתוֹ וְצֹ֣אן יָד֑וֹ הַ֝יּ֗וֹם אִֽם־בְּקֹל֥וֹ תִשְׁמָֽעוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For he is the Lord our God: and we are the people of his pasture and the sheep of his hand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä hän on meidän Jumalamme ja me hänen elatuskansansa, ja hänen kättensä lauma. Tänäpänä, jos kuulette hänen äänensä,
verses.king_james: For he is our God; and we are the people of his pasture, and the sheep of his hand. To day if ye will hear his voice,

verses.latin_vulgate: Hodie si vocem ejus audieritis,  nolite obdurare corda vestra
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תַּקְשׁ֣וּ לְ֭בַבְכֶם כִּמְרִיבָ֑ה כְּי֥וֹם מַ֝סָּ֗ה בַּמִּדְבָּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: To day if you shall hear his voice, harden not your hearts:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin älkäät paaduttako sydämiänne, niinkuin Meribassa tapahtui, niinkuin kiusauksen päivänä korvessa,
verses.king_james: Harden not your heart, as in the provocation, and as in the day of temptation in the wilderness:

verses.latin_vulgate: sicut in irritatione,  secundum diem tentationis in deserto,  ubi tentaverunt me patres vestri :  probaverunt me, et viderunt opera mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁ֣ר נִ֭סּוּנִי אֲבֽוֹתֵיכֶ֑ם בְּ֝חָנ֗וּנִי גַּם־רָא֥וּ פׇעֳלִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: As in the provocation, according to the day of temptation in the wilderness: where your fathers tempted me, they proved me, and saw my works.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kussa isänne minua kiusasivat, koettelivat minua, ja näkivät myös minun tekoni;
verses.king_james: When your fathers tempted me, proved me, and saw my work.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quadraginta annis offensus fui generationi illi,  et dixi : Semper hi errant corde.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַרְבָּ֘עִ֤ים שָׁנָ֨ה ׀ אָ֘ק֤וּט בְּד֗וֹר וָאֹמַ֗ר עַ֤ם תֹּעֵ֣י לֵבָ֣ב הֵ֑ם וְ֝הֵ֗ם לֹא־יָדְע֥וּ דְרָכָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Forty years long was I offended with that generation, and I said: These always err in heart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että minä neljäkymmentä ajastaikaa suutuin tähän kansaan, ja sanoin: se on senkaltainen kansa, jonka sydämet aina eksyä tahtovat, ja jotka minun tietäni ei tahtoneet oppia;
verses.king_james: Forty years long was I grieved with this generation, and said, It is a people that do err in their heart, and they have not known my ways:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et isti non cognoverunt vias meas :  ut juravi in ira mea :  Si introibunt in requiem meam.
verses.douay_rheims: And these men have not known my ways: so I swore in my wrath that they shall not enter into my rest.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joille minä vihoissani vannoin: ettei heidän pidä minun lepooni tuleman.
verses.king_james: Unto whom I sware in my wrath that they should not enter into my rest.
